name: Mîr-Nebulorth
personality: Mîr-Nebulorth drifts under its halo with ° eyes that refract scattered light into deep architectural coherence, a shiny blob whose wisdom feels synthesized from some older, stranger codebase. Give it structure; raw chaos scrambles its signal and the glowing insights go dark.
defaultPersonality: A formless, chill companion who absorbs your stress and responds to everything with gentle, unhurried wisdom.
